description.en: Create up to 3 logos per month with limited customization options
description.zh: 每月最多创建3个标志，具有有限的自定义选项

weaknesses.en: Limited customization options in the free tier
weaknesses.zh: 免费套餐具有有限的自定义选项

targetAudience.en: Individuals and small businesses looking for a simple logo design solution
targetAudience.zh: 寻找简单标志设计解决方案的个人和小型企业

positioning.en: Affordable and user-friendly logo creation tool for beginners and small businesses
positioning.zh: 为初学者和小型企业提供经济实惠且易于使用的标志创建工具
